CODEINE.recommendation: Avoid codeine due to lack of efficacy. Consider alternative analgesics (e.g., morphine, non-opioids).

TRAMADOL.recommendation: Avoid tramadol due to lack of efficacy. Consider alternative analgesics.

CODEINE.recommendation: Use label recommended age-specific dosing. If no response, consider alternative.
Avoid codeine due to potential for toxicity (life-threatening respiratory depression).

CLOPIDOGREL.recommendation: Avoid clopidogrel. Consider alternative antiplatelet therapy (e.g., prasugrel, ticagrelor).
Consider alternative antiplatelet therapy (e.g., prasugrel, ticagrelor).

WARFARIN.recommendation: Lower initial dose required. Calculate dose based on genotype or use alternative anticoagulant.

SIMVASTATIN.recommendation: Prescribe a lower dose or consider an alternative statin (e.g., rosuvastatin) to reduce myopathy risk.
Prescribe a lower dose (max 20mg daily) or consider an alternative statin.

AZATHIOPRINE.recommendation: Drastically reduce dose (start at 10% of normal) or choose alternative agent. Monitoring required.
Start with reduced dose (30-70% of normal). Adjust based on myelosuppression.

FLUOROURACIL.recommendation: Reduce starting dose by 50%. Titrate based on toxicity.
